---
title: "Research projects"
description: |
  Research Projects, in which I have partecipated or I am actively participating.
listing:
  - id: active
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 100px
    fields: [image, title, description]
    contents: 
      - seewandell/index.qmd
    sort: "false" 
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
  
  - id: past
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 100px
    fields: [image, title, description]
    contents: 
      - RocasAtoll/index.qmd
    sort: "false" 
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
---

::: {.lang-switch}
🌐 **English** · [Italiano](index_sci_pro.it.qmd) · [Español](index_sci_pro.es.qmd) · [Português](index_sci_pro.pt.qmd) · [Français](index_sci_pro.fr.qmd) · [Deutsch](index_sci_pro.de.qmd)
:::

## Active Projects

::: {#active}
:::

## Past Projects

::: {#past}
:::
